Thought 4: Both suspects have strong motives and opportunity, but I need to look for the most direct link. For Octavia, while she has a motive and was on patrol, there is no direct link to the crowbar. Additionally, her secretive behavior (deleting apps, refusing a photo) is consistent with her character and motive to protect her privacy, but it doesn't directly tie her to the murder. On the other- hand, Addison's motive is directly tied to Ernest's threat to expose his cheating, which would immediately revoke his scholarship. The narrative also highlights Addison's statement about the scholarship being his "ticket out of this town" and his fear of it being revoked. This seems more immediate and personal. Moreover, Addison was present at the campsite on the day of the murder, which is confirmed. While Octavia was on patrol, it's not clear if she was there at the exact time of the murder. Based on the evidence, Addison appears to be the more likely murderer.
